source.sqlReaderQuery:
select table_name,
watermark_column,
last_watermark_value
from dbo.ADF_Watermark_Control

text.value:
UPDATE dbo.ADF_Watermark_Control
SET last_watermark_value = @watermark_value,
updated_at = GETDATE()
WHERE table_name = @table_n
